creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
From the dialogue that appears when the application starts: 

qutebrowser needs QtWebKit or QtWebEngine, but neither could be imported!
The errors encountered were:
QtWebKit: Unavailable with PyQt6
QtWebEngine: No module named 'PyQt6.QtWebEngineCore'
Qt wrapper info:
PyQt6: success
PyQt5: not imported
-> selected: PyQt6 (via autoselect)


(The application can not be used.)

Name           : qutebrowser
Version        : 2.5.4_1
Installed on   : Thu Aug 31 22:05:56 2023 BST
Origin         : www/qutebrowser

Options        :
        ADBLOCK        : on
Annotations    :
        cpe            : cpe:2.3:a:qutebrowser:qutebrowser:2.5.4:::::freebsd15:x64:1
        repo_type      : binary
        repository     : FreeBSD
Flat size      : 7.98MiB
Description    :
Qutebrowser is a keyboard-focused browser with a minimal GUI.
It's based on Python and PyQt5 and free software, licensed under the GPL.

It was inspired by other browsers/addons like dwb and Vimperator/Pentadactyl.
